title: Yourellian
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
[[File:Han_Solo_in_The_Star_Wars.png|thumb|250px|Han Solo as a Ureallian, with [[Luke Skywalker (The Star Wars)|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Clieg Whitsun]]]]
'''Yourellians''', also known as '''Urellians''' or '''Ureallians''', were a race of large, slime-covered [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] with green skin and gills.<ref name=":0">[[The Star Wars 4|''The Star Wars'' 4]]</ref> They hunted and trapped [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]], and spoke the [[Wookiee language]] [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]].<ref name="The Star Wars 7">[[The Star Wars 7|''The Star Wars'' 7]]</ref>

[[Han Solo (The Star Wars)|Han Solo]] was a Ureallian.<ref name=":0" />

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Yourellians were described by [[George Lucas]] during the development of Lucas's [[1977]] film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']], and were present in Lucas's 132-page [[The Star Wars rough draft|''The Star Wars: Rough Draft'']], completed in [[May]] [[1974]]. In the draft, Solo is a [[Yourellian|Ureallian]], and is described as a "huge green-skinned monster with no nose and large gills". He is a member of the Jedi [[Bendu (religion)|Bendu]] and an old friend of General Skywalker.<ref name="The Star Wars rough draft">[[The Star Wars rough draft|''The Star Wars'' rough draft]]</ref> Although Lucas had originally intended for Solo to be a nefarious alien character, he settled on the idea of a Human so that he could develop more of a relationship between the film's three primary characters. Chewbacca thus filled the role of the alien sidekick.<ref name="characters">The Characters of ''Star Wars'' - [[Star Wars Trilogy (DVD)]]</ref> By [[August]] [[1975]], when Lucas had written his [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|third draft]], Solo was described as: "A tough James Dean style starpilot about twenty-five years old. A cowboy in a starship -- simple, sentimental and cocksure of himself."<ref name="third draft">{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwarz.com/starkiller/scripts/thestarwars_third_draft.htm|text="THE STAR WARS" - From The Adventures of Luke Starkiller by George Lucas|work=Starkiller - The Jedi Bendu Script Site|archivedate=20100428061152}}</ref> This incarnation of Solo's character went on to appear in the finished film.<ref name="Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope">{{Film|IV}}</ref>

The name Yourellian or Ureallian was slightly changed by the addition of a K or C to become Korellian or [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] ethnicity of Han Solo as established in later medias.<ref name="Mission from Mount Yoda">''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]''</ref>

Han Solo appeared as a Urellian in [[The Star Wars 4|''The Star Wars'' 4]], a licensed but non-[[canon]] [[The Star Wars|comic adapted]] from Lucas's [[The Star Wars rough draft|original drafts]].<ref name=":0" />
